hero.title: Grade homework
hero.subtitle: TekshirAI photographs a student's notebook, AI grades every problem step by step and explains the mistake. Teachers, parents and directors see results in real time.

problem.title: Grading homework by hand is outdated
problem.subtitle: One teacher checks hundreds of notebooks. There's never enough time, mistakes slip through, and students get feedback too late.

items.title: Slow and exhausting
items.desc: Checking every notebook by hand takes hours.

items.title: Parents are in the dark
items.desc: Where a child struggles stays invisible to parents.

items.title: Late feedback
items.desc: Students learn of mistakes days later and have already forgotten.

items.title: No single view
items.desc: Directors can't see the overall picture across the school.

how.title: Ready in three steps
how.subtitle: No complex setup. Take a photo — the AI does the rest.

steps.title: Take a photo
steps.desc: The student photographs their completed homework on a phone.

steps.title: AI checks it
steps.desc: Google Gemini reads every problem and grades the solution step by step.

steps.title: Result & explanation
steps.desc: Score, where the mistake is, the correct solution and a real-life example — instantly.

features.title: One platform — everything
features.subtitle: From student to director — real value for everyone.

items.title: AI homework checking
items.desc: Problem-by-problem grading across 14 subjects, step explanations and real-life examples.

items.title: Gamification
items.desc: XP, 7 levels, daily streaks and badges — turns learning into a game.

items.title: 3D interactive lessons
items.desc: 3D models controlled by hand gestures (MediaPipe) — anatomy, atoms, the cosmos.

items.title: Role dashboards
items.desc: Dedicated dashboards and analytics for student, teacher, parent and director.

items.title: Biometric login
items.desc: Secure, fast sign-in with Face ID / fingerprint (WebAuthn).

items.title: GPS auto-detect
items.desc: 14 regions, 203 districts — location detected automatically via GPS.

demo.title: See the project in action
demo.subtitle: A short video of how TekshirAI works.

ways.title: Use it two ways
ways.subtitle: Telegram bot or browser — pick what suits you. Same account either way.

telegram.title: Telegram mini app
telegram.desc: A full app inside the bot, without leaving Telegram.

pwa.title: Browser / PWA
pwa.desc: On any device — phone, tablet, computer. Install to your home screen.
steps: Open the site in your browser
Sign up with a username and password

tech.title: Modern technology
tech.subtitle: A reliable, fast and scalable architecture.

achievements.title: Do'ppiX team achievements
achievements.subtitle: Winners recognized at national and international level.

realHolat.title: Real Holat Hackathon
realHolat.desc: Team "Do'ppiX" won the "Real Holat" (Data. Design. Impact) hackathon and received an 80,000,000 UZS Development Grant to grow the project.

aiHackathon.title: National AI Hackathon
aiHackathon.desc: Team "Do'ppiX" won the National AI Hackathon held in Termez. Over 500 talented young people competed with their teams to build innovative AI solutions.

cybershield.title: Cybershield — "Engineers of the Future"
cybershield.desc: At the international festival with SCO member states, team "Do'ppiX" defended Uzbekistan's honor and took an honorable 1st place.

footer.tagline: Quality feedback for every student, powered by AI.
